query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mall_product_reviews` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `productId` int NOT NULL,
  `lineUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `rating` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(100),
  `content` text,
  `imageUrls` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_reviews_product` (`productId`),
  INDEX `idx_reviews_user` (`lineUserId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mall_product_desc_images` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `productId` int NOT NULL,
  `imageUrl` text NOT NULL,
  `imageKey` varchar(500),
  `sortOrder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `caption` varchar(200),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_desc_images_product` (`productId`)
);
